text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Ohh～～ You got it. My next souvenir will be all set with this one.

text_block_list.text:
I didn't think you had this kind of skill 
in you. Hahaha, you're pretty good.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold

Thank you Trainer. 
You helped me out.
